_meta.title: Soldut — Stump cap (single 256x256 torn-metal cross-section)
_meta.description: AI-generated replacement for documents/m5/11-art-direction.md §'Pipeline 5 — Hand-drawn stump caps'. The doc warns AI is weak here; we focus the prompt and downsample 8x to 32x32 to hide tells. Run 5x with different seeds for stump_shoulder_l/_r/_hip_l/_hip_r/_neck.
